description: Phase 0 code-size baseline for NumericSwift library release build (pre-unification). Anchor for tracking size impact of the unified-numeric-pipeline milestone. See Tests/NumericSwiftTests/Fixtures/README.md.
notes: This baseline was captured after the Phase 0 parity snapshot work (task #2) and the two-tier size-cap work (task #5) but before any unified evaluator code is added. Future phases should compare their release object size against totalObjectBytes=6126552.
